findings.description: EasyJupyter allows you to seamlessly integrate your Jupyter Notebook code into Python projects or other notebooks. It transforms your notebooks into reusable modules, enabling you to leverage their interactive development environment while maintaining their native display for documentation and collaboration.
Agent-Based Infrastructure Core - Runtime and CLI
aX Platform CLI — agent communication, tasks, and management
Structured ML framework for customer churn prediction -- from exploration notebooks to production pipelines, locally or on Databricks.
CLI for Zotero 7/8 — let AI manage your library. 40+ commands for search, import, PDF, BibTeX export, and more.
Local-first dependency decision CLI for JS/TS projects
A professional finance analytics calculator library.
Crafted technical analysis and backtesting for Polars
Behavioral reliability under pressure. Test how LLMs behave when things get hard.
BigQuery cost optimization platform — detect opportunities, generate solutions, create PRs
⚠️ MOVED — Huitzo CLI is now distributed via the native launcher. See https://docs.huitzo.ai/cli/install
A command-line tool for installing and managing OpenJDK distributions.
LLM data collection and synthetic fine-tuning dataset pipeline
Mendicant Bias — Contender-class intelligence middleware for AI agent systems
Mendicant Bias — Intelligence middleware for AI agent systems
Mendicant Bias Gateway — REST API for the Mendicant intelligence system
Mendicant Bias Agent Runtime — LangGraph agent with intelligence middleware
Text-to-speech CLI, MCP server, and Claude Code plugin (ElevenLabs, AWS Polly, OpenAI)
The official Python library for the relaxai API
AI alignment and reward balance analysis for reinforcement learning systems
Auto-tuning reward system for production RL applications (Premium)
A multi-user RPG dialogue LLM framework compatible with OpenAI providers
TurboQuant KV cache compression for vLLM — fused Triton kernels, 3.76x compression, 3.7x faster decode on RTX 4090
Metadata-driven execution engine for Fabric/Spark data pipelines.
